EpubCore.Cli 0.9.3.0+858796221c5114b153add76d851d38e8257b7aa4
Copyright 2025

  add-resource            Add a new resource from the EPub.

  extract                 Extract the contents of this EPub file

  gen-cli-docs            Generate documentation for the CLI

  get-details             Get details about this EPub file

  get-html                Get contents of html file

  remove-resource         Remove an existing resource from the EPub.

  replace-cover           Replace the cover image in the epub.

                          content.

  replace-css-content     Replace the contents of an existing css with new css.

  update-authors          Update the author(s) in the epub.

  update-publisher        Update the publisher(s) in the epub.

  update-titles           Update the title(s) in the epub.

  help                    Display more information on a specific command.

  version                 Display version information.

EpubCore.Cli 0.9.3.0+858796221c5114b153add76d851d38e8257b7aa4

  add-resource            Add a new resource from the EPub.

  extract                 Extract the contents of this EPub file

  gen-cli-docs            Generate documentation for the CLI

  get-details             Get details about this EPub file

  get-html                Get contents of html file

  remove-resource         Remove an existing resource from the EPub.

  replace-cover           Replace the cover image in the epub.

  replace-html-content    Replace the contents of an existing html with new html
                          content.

  replace-css-content     Replace the contents of an existing css with new css.

  update-authors          Update the author(s) in the epub.

  update-publisher        Update the publisher(s) in the epub.

  update-titles           Update the title(s) in the epub.

  help                    Display more information on a specific command.

  version                 Display version information.

result.stdout:
EpubCore.Cli 0.9.3.0+858796221c5114b153add76d851d38e8257b7aa4
Copyright 2025

  -a, --add-resource       Required. Path to new new EPub resource to add

  -b, --before-resource    Add before this existing EPub resource
                           (name-of-existing.html)

  -t, --resource-type      Required. Type of EPub resource (Html, Css, Font,
                           Image, Other)

  -o, --out                Path to write final epub.  If empty, overwrites input
                           epub

  -i, --in                 Required. Path to epub to parse

  -v, --verbose            (Default: false) If true, writes heaps of logging

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.
